name: Insekimon

signature_move.name: Cosmo Flash
signature_move.description: 123Emits a mysterious, cosmic energy wave.Shoots energy balls that send what they hit to another dimension.Opens a hole in space, then releases a meteor shower of cosmic energy from it.

description: A form of Gottsumon which for some reason had the meteorite data within the ore data it possesses appear on its surface. It is made from a hard material which only exists in space, and possesses powerful defensive ability. Its Special Move is emitting a mysterious, cosmic energy wave ( Cosmo Flash ).
